title: Audit wc_ecc_* bindings and RNG/blinding requirements
description: Before implementing native ECDH, confirm all needed wc_ecc_* bindings are exposed in wolfcrypt-rs/src/lib.rs and identify any gaps. Key questions: (1) Is wc_ecc_set_rng bound? (wc_ecc_shared_secret may need an RNG attached to the key for scalar-blinding in a standard build.) (2) Is wc_ecc_check_key bound? (needed to reject invalid peer public key points before calling wc_ecc_shared_secret). (3) Confirm ECC_SECP521R1 constant value is correct (=16). Document any bindings that need to be added before implementation.
